title: Better Text Editor (BTE)
description: Overhaul Minecraft's text editing in chat, books, and signs with mouse selection, context menus, and UTF-8 support.
body:
**Better Text Editor** completely overhauls the vanilla Minecraft text input system, bringing modern, standard text editing features directly into the game. If you've ever felt frustrated by the clunky controls when typing in chat, writing a book, or formatting a sign, this quality-of-life (QoL) mod is the perfect solution.

## ✨ Key Features

*   **Convenient Mouse Selection:** Say goodbye to awkward keyboard-only navigation! Click and drag with your mouse to highlight text exactly like you would in any standard operating system or word processor.
*   **Right-Click Context Menu:** Instantly access essential actions (such as Cut, Copy, Paste, and Select All) with a simple right-click inside any text field.
*   **Text Color Control:** Easily apply formatting and color codes to your messages, signs, and books without having to memorize complex formatting syntax.
*   **UTF-8 Character Support:** Seamlessly insert special characters, custom symbols, and standard UTF-8 text to make your chat and builds stand out.
*   **Universal Integration:** Designed to work flawlessly across the **Chat**, **Books and Quills**, and **Signs**.

## 🎯 Why Download This Mod?

Minecraft's default text fields lack the basic functionality we expect from modern software. **Better Text Editor** bridges that gap, making communication, server administration, and creative writing in-game significantly faster and more intuitive. Whether you are an active server admin, a builder making detailed signs, or a roleplayer writing books, this mod will save you time and frustration.

*Stay tuned — even more exciting features are actively in development!*
